{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/60306789?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/morimori-dev/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/morimori-dev/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/morimori-dev/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/morimori-dev/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/morimori-dev", "id": 60306789, "login": "morimori-dev", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjYwMzA2Nzg5", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/morimori-dev/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/morimori-dev/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/morimori-dev/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/morimori-dev/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/morimori-dev/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/morimori-dev", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-33692", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-20", "name": "Improper Input Validation"}], "description": "## Vulnerability Details

**CWE**: CWE-538 - Insertion of Sensitive Information into Externally-Accessible File or Directory

The official `docker-compose.yml` (line 61) mounts the entire project root directory as the Apache document root:

```yaml
volumes:
  - "./:/var/www/html/AVideo"
```

This causes the `.env` file — which contains database credentials, admin passwords, and infrastructure configuration — to be served as a static file at `/.env`. No `.htaccess` rule or Apache configuration blocks access to dotfiles.

### Exposed Information

An unauthenticated request to `GET /.env` returns:

```
DB_MYSQL_HOST=database
DB_MYSQL_USER=avideo
DB_MYSQL_PASSWORD=avideo
SYSTEM_ADMIN_PASSWORD=admin123
TLS_CERTIFICATE_FILE=/etc/apache2/ssl/localhost.crt
TLS_CERTIFICATE_KEY=/etc/apache2/ssl/localhost.key
NETWORK_SUBNET=172.30.0.0/16
```

## Steps to Reproduce

### Prerequisites
- AVideo deployed using the official `docker-compose.yml`
- No modifications to the default configuration

### Steps
1. Deploy AVideo using `docker compose up -d`
2. Send: `curl http://target/.env`
3. The full `.env` file contents are returned, including database credentials and admin password

## Impact

- **Attacker**: Unauthenticated (any remote user)
- **Victim**: AVideo server and database
- **Specific damage**: Attacker obtains database credentials (`DB_MYSQL_USER`, `DB_MYSQL_PASSWORD`), admin password (`SYSTEM_ADMIN_PASSWORD`), and internal network topology (`NETWORK_SUBNET`). This enables direct database access, admin panel takeover, and further lateral movement within the Docker network.

## Proposed Fix

Add a `.htaccess` rule to block access to dotfiles:

```apache
# Block access to hidden files (.env, .git, etc.)
<FilesMatch "^\.">
    Order Allow,Deny
    Deny from all
</FilesMatch>
```

Or configure Apache to deny dotfile access in the virtual host configuration.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00451, "percentile": 0.36432}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-wf69-r4mx-43rr", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-22T19:54:15Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wf69-r4mx-43rr", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-wf69-r4mx-43rr"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-33692"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-22T19:54:15Z", "references": ["https://github.com/WWBN/AVideo/security/advisories/GHSA-wf69-r4mx-43rr", "https://github.com/WWBN/AVideo/commit/7f418de1a95ab87bb8c8c3eb3702d71c351e098d", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wf69-r4mx-43rr"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/WWBN/AVideo/security-advisories/GHSA-wf69-r4mx-43rr", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/WWBN/AVideo", "summary": "AVideo Vulnerable to Unauthenticated .env File Exposure via Official Docker Compose Configuration", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-22T19:54:15Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-wf69-r4mx-43rr", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "29.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "wwbn/avideo"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 29.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: AVideo Vulnerable to Unauthenticated .env File Exposure via Official Docker Compose Configuration
